items.briefing:
GitHub has confirmed a breach in which around 4,000 internal repositories were stolen — if your organisation uses GitHub, review what code or credentials may be stored there. Separately, fake Android apps are being used to commit billing fraud by silently signing users up to premium services; staff should only download apps from trusted sources and check their phone bills for unexpected charges.

New data shows organisations are falling further behind on fixing known security vulnerabilities. **Practical tip:** Check your mobile device for unfamiliar apps and remove anything you don't recognise installing yourself.

featured.title: Australian budget AI push earns cautious tech support
featured.quote: Australian government AI funding could reshape cybersecurity landscape if tech concerns are addressed.
